title: Drop
description: A dead-drop ephemeral data share. Free tier: 10KB, 7-day lifespan. Deep tier: 4MB, 90-day lifespan. Private drops are end-to-end encrypted client-side (zero-knowledge); public drops are plaintext.

id.description: SHA-256 hash of the drop name.

name.description: Human-friendly 4-word kebab-case drop name generated from the EFF Diceware wordlist.

tier.description: Drop tier. Free: 10KB, 7 days. Deep: 4MB, 90 days.

visibility.description: Drop visibility. Private drops are encrypted; public drops are plaintext.

payload.description: For private drops: hex-encoded AES-GCM ciphertext. For public drops: raw content string.

salt.description: Hex-encoded 16-byte salt for PBKDF2 key derivation.

iv.description: Hex-encoded 12-byte AES-GCM initialization vector. Null for public drops.

encryptionAlgo.description: Encryption algorithm identifier. Null for public drops.

hashAlgo.description: Hash algorithm used for the drop id and admin authentication.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical content payload JSON. Used for optimistic concurrency and admin auth.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the drop expires and is purged.
